text:
There once was a young boy named Timmy who lived in the little town of Maplewood Meadows. One sunny morning, while exploring the woods behind his house, he found a hidden cave and got stuck inside, his shoes getting wet along the way. The cave was old and twisted, and the darkness was endless, but suddenly, he heard something.

It was soft, like whispering leaves—a voice. Calling out, he asked, "Hello? Is someone there?" No answer came. He pressed his ear against the rock wall, listening. "Is this thing on? Hello? Can you hear me?" Still nothing. Fearing he'd take too long and start to cave in, Timmy scooted back and managed to escape.

When he got home, he told his parents everything. They laughed, shaking their heads. "Just a spider?" They said. But Timmy didn't laugh. He thought about the voice and wondered if maybe it wasn't a spider.

He decided to build
